bug.description: race condition between timer expiry handler and normal message processing

prompt:
There is a race condition between timer expiry handler and normal message processing downstream of function dump_time_zone_and_time_xml in the openair3/NAS/COMMON subsystem.
The function is located at openair3/NAS/COMMON/IES/TimeZoneAndTime.c:91.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
